design_name: Spur gear with extended hub, bore, keyway, and radial set screw hole. Gear body is 10mm thick with 20-tooth star-polygon profile; hub extends 20mm above gear face along Z axis.
prompt: A spur gear with an extended hub and radial set screw hole, standing upright along the Z axis, centered at the origin in XY. The gear has 20 teeth with a star-polygon tooth profile (48mm tip diameter (24mm radius), 40mm root diameter (20mm radius)) and is 10mm thick (Z=0 to Z=10). A cylindrical hub 16mm in diameter extends from Z=0 to Z=30, protruding 20mm above the gear face. A 10mm diameter bore runs through the full 30mm length along Z. A keyway slot 4mm wide (Y) and 2.5mm deep (radially, from the bore surface at radius 5mm to radius 7.5mm) runs the full 30mm length on the +X side. A 4mm diameter set screw hole is drilled radially through the hub at Z=20mm, oriented along the X axis, passing through both walls of the hub.
primitive_plan_summary: Spur gear with extended hub, bore, keyway, and radial set screw hole. Gear body is 10mm thick with 20-tooth star-polygon profile; hub extends 20mm above gear face along Z axis.

verifier_score.feedback:
All constraints met. Detailed verification:

1. **Gear teeth**: 20 teeth visible in all three views, with star-polygon profile. Bounding box XY is ~47.4mm, which is consistent with a 48mm tip diameter (the slight shortfall is due to the sinusoidal interpolation not perfectly hitting the exact 24mm radius at every tooth tip — acceptable).

2. **Gear thickness**: Z extends from 0 to 30mm total (zlen=30mm), gear portion is 10mm thick (Z=0 to Z=10) — confirmed by the front profile view showing the gear disc and hub proportions.

3. **Hub**: 16mm diameter cylindrical hub extending from Z=0 to Z=30, protruding 20mm above the gear face (Z=10 to Z=30) — visible in isometric and front views.

4. **Bore**: 10mm diameter central bore running full 30mm length — visible in the top-down center view as a circular hole through the hub.

5. **Keyway**: 4mm wide, 2.5mm deep keyway on the +X side running the full 30mm length — visible in the center (top-down) view as a rectangular notch in the bore wall on one side.

6. **Set screw hole**: 4mm diameter radial hole at Z=20mm along X axis through both hub walls — visible in the right (front profile) view as a small circular hole through the hub above the gear face. Also visible in the center view.

7. **Centering**: Part is centered at origin in XY (center of mass X offset of -0.1mm is due to the keyway asymmetry on +X side, which is correct).

8. **Volume**: ~16,578 mm³ is physically plausible for this geometry.

9. **Mesh quality**: Valid, watertight, no self-intersections, consistent normals.
